## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.1

### 🔔 Blueprint
- Changes the camera event blueprint default notification to use a selected Home Assistant Companion app device instead of the generic `notify.notify` action.
- Keeps the Motion recording URL as the mobile notification tap target when X-Sense provides a playback URL.
- Adds an explicit `View recording` URI action to the mobile notification.
- Keeps optional extra actions available after the default mobile app notification.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the mobile app device selector and default mobile app notification action.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
